sonnet_review.biasedText: President Trump wasted no time asserting his second-term agenda Monday
sonnet_review.reason: Matches my detection of 'wasted no time asserting his second-term agenda' as spin with positive, energetic framing.
Matches my detection of 'His systematic dismantling of Biden-era policies' as loaded word choice. Sonnet correctly identified the dramatic, interpretive nature of this language.
Matches my detection of 'rolling back several of his predecessor's pet projects' as dismissive and belittling characterization of Biden-era policies.

gpt_review.biasedText: President Trump wasted no time asserting his second-term agenda Monday – signing dozens of executive orders in a flurry of activity that began just moments after taking the oath of office.
gpt_review.reason: Matches two of my detections: 'wasted no time asserting his second-term agenda' and 'flurry of activity' as positive spin language.

gpt_review.biasedText: Trump, 78, kicked off his avalanche of Day 1 actions at the US Capitol
gpt_review.reason: Matches my detection of 'avalanche of Day 1 actions' as sensational, dramatic language.

gpt_review.biasedText: The packed arena erupted in cheers as the president put ink to paper and then tossed the pens into the crowd, allowing a few of his lucky supporters to go home with historic souvenirs.
gpt_review.reason: Matches my detection of this passage as positive editorial spin with 'lucky' and 'historic souvenirs' framing.

gpt_review.biasedText: in a stark departure from Biden, simultaneously answered questions from the press.
gpt_review.reason: Matches my detection of the 'stark departure from Biden' comparison as editorializing that favorably frames Trump against Biden without proper context.

gpt_review.biasedText: Trump's expected to sign even more executive orders in the coming days to quickly make good on his many campaign promises.
gpt_review.reason: I didn't flag this specifically, but 'make good on his many campaign promises' does adopt a favorable framing, suggesting promise-keeping rather than neutrally describing planned future actions.
